General.Name: Shandong Gold Mining Co Ltd
General.Description: Shandong Gold Mining Co., Ltd. engages in the exploration, mining, processing, smelting, and selling of gold and silver ores in the People's Republic of China. It also explores for silver, copper, iron, lead, and zinc metals. In addition, the company engages in the production and sell gold mines equipment and building decoration materials, as well as invests in gold bars. Further, it offers ecological restoration and environmental protection, investment and asset management, construction engineering, futures brokerage, and consulting and investigation services. Shandong Gold Mining Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Jinan, the People's Republic of China.

3.Name: Ms. Yanfen  Liu
3.Title: Deputy Head of Auditing & Legal Affairs Department and Executive Director
